commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Don’t think it was without purpose that Scripture indicated to us his age; instead, it was for you to learn from the just man’s obedience in meekly submitting to pain despite his extreme old age on account of God’s command, and not only he but also Ishmael and all the servants—that was the reason for giving the ages.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
